narrative:
Washington Twp I (precinct in Montgomery County) has 896 registered voters, with 54.7% unaffiliated or lacking primary history. Republican-leaning voters make up 23.5% of registrants and Democratic-leaning voters account for 21.8%, a narrow Republican lean of 1.8 percentage points.
